final:
module mux4x1 (  
    input wire [3:0] obf_in,  // 4 input signals  
    input wire [1:0] sel, // 2-bit select signal  
    output wire out       // output signal  
);  
    assign out = (sel == 2'b00) ? obf_in[0] :  
                 (sel == 2'b01) ? obf_in[1] :  
                 (sel == 2'b10) ? obf_in[2] :  
                 obf_in[3]; // default to obf_in[3]  
endmodule
